prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on benzene performed with the chemkit frontier-orbitals skill using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF. Gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Single-point on the user-supplied XYZ geometry (not relaxed at this level). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. HOMO = −7.04683 eV, LUMO = −0.41575 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.63109 eV. The HOMO/HOMO−1 pair and LUMO/LUMO+1 pair are each near-degenerate, consistent with the e1g and e2u symmetry of D6h benzene. Integrity verdict: trustworthy = true, all engine checks passed.
